errors.description: Severe token estimation underestimation - estimated 3000 actual 17000
errors.root_cause: Token estimation 467% too low, possible causes: task complexity underestimation, multi-file cumulative consumption not considered, calibration coefficient not applied

resolution.prevention: Update calibration coefficient, current deviation ratio: 5.67x

errors.root_cause: Authorization check step was skipped or not executed properly

resolution.immediate: Stop operation immediately, apologize to user and request authorization
resolution.prevention: Add mandatory authorization verification checkpoint before operation execution
